MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-01-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF S & C MOTORS, INC., dba S & C KIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES.
APPEARANCE: Michael M. Sieving, Esq. of Law Offices of Michael M. Sieving 916/649-3500 for pltf & moving party; Colm A. Moran, Esq. of Kirkpatrick & Lockhart Nicholson Graham LLP 310/552-5000 for deft & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court denied the motion for summary judgment/summary adjudication. Court finds moving party did not shift burden as to tort claims and as to B&P 17200. Court also finds as to breach of contract claim, triable issue of material fact as to what contract was breached. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/REQ/KD) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
